name: Web Search
description: Search the web and visit specific user-provided URLs to extract readable text.

toolDeclarations.name: google_search
toolDeclarations.description: Search for information on the web. Returns a summary of findings.

query.description: The search query, e.g. 'current fuel price in Lagos'

preferDynamic.description: If true, bypasses the static search engine and immediately starts a dynamic WebView scraper session. Use this when the user explicitly asks for a dynamic, deep, or thorough search, or if previous searches were blocked.

toolDeclarations.name: visit_website
toolDeclarations.description: Visit any specific user-provided website URL to extract readable text content. Use this directly when the user provides a custom link, profile URL, article URL, LinkedIn URL, portfolio, CV page, or asks to scrape/read a link.

url.description: The full URL of the website to visit.

toolDeclarations.name: scrape_url
toolDeclarations.description: Alias for visit_website. Scrape/read a specific custom URL provided by the user and extract readable text content.

url.description: The full custom URL to scrape or read.

toolDeclarations.name: agentic_dynamic_scrape
toolDeclarations.description: Use the dynamic mobile Chrome scraper for JavaScript-heavy websites or tasks that require browser navigation such as clicking, typing, scrolling, waiting, then extracting exact information. Prefer this when normal visit_website/scrape_url fails, returns an empty shell, says JavaScript is required, or the user explicitly asks for an agentic/dynamic scrape.

url.description: The full URL to open in the dynamic scraper.

goal.description: The exact scraping/navigation goal, e.g. 'Search for iPhone 13 and return the cheapest visible price with product URL'.

outputSchema.description: Optional JSON-like schema describing the desired extracted fields.
